question_text:
Utterance: Add Sabrina Salerno to the grime instrumentals playlist.

A. add_to_playlist
B. book_restaurant
C. get_weather
D. play_music
E. search_screening_event
F. search_creative_work
G. rate_book

Alex and Carson were fighting over a toy and Alex hit Carson in the head. What will Alex want to do next?

A. get their toy
B. Take the toy away
C. Be nice to Carson

Carson pulled lint out of Tracy's pocket while they were trying to steal something. What does Carson need to do before this?

A. needed to make the pants
B. needed to wear the pants
C. needed to be sneaky

Quinn put garbage in the machine as soon as the party was over. How would you describe Quinn?

A. keeps their garbage clean
B. organized
C. had felt joy

Sasha declared war on Russia in the board game with friends. How would Others feel as a result?

A. quite unruly
B. very calm
C. happy with her choice

Jan ate week old spaghetti and then was feeling unexpectedly ill. How would you describe Jan?

A. somebody who does not think much
B. sick
C. somebody who doesn't care for health

options: somebody who does not think much
somebody who doesn't care for health

question_text:
Riley began another story about a cowboy riding a horse in the desert. What will Others want to do next?

A. smart
B. bored
C. she liked writing

Aubrey gave Addison direction's to the play because the GPS was broken and they didn't want to get lost. What will happen to Addison?

A. get to the movie
B. get a new GPS
C. get lost

Addison was going to be working late. To help out, Jesse offered to walk Addison's dog. What will Jesse want to do next?

A. be a friend to Addison
B. help out for Addison
C. take the dog to the park

options: take the dog to the park

question_text:
Skylar gave the motorist a speeding ticket to meet his quota for the day. How would you describe Skylar?

A. a pig
B. a toll booth manager
C. relieved to avoid it
